name: north-launcher
description: North Launcher - Len1th tarafÄ±ndan geliÅŸtirilen modern Minecraft launcher
author: Len1th <mberkaslan0@gmail.com>

scripts.build: corepack pnpm build:renderer && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-electron-app build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-runtime-api check && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-runtime check && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-electron-app check && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-keystone-ui check
scripts.lint: oxlint -c ./.oxlintrc.json packages && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-keystone-ui lint && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-runtime lint && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-runtime-api lint && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-electron-app lint
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint -c ./.oxlintrc.json packages --fix && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-runtime-api lint:fix && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-runtime lint:fix && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-electron-app lint:fix && corepack pnpm run --prefix=xmcl-keystone-ui lint:fix
